2606.32002.title: Self-Study Reconsidered: The Hidden Fragility of Learning from Self-Generated QA
2606.32002.paper_summary: Language models are increasingly taught from synthetic question--answer (QA) supervision: a model generates questions about a document, answers them from the same text, and the resulting pairs are used to fine-tune, distill, or compress knowledge into another model. We show that this generation step is not neutral preprocessing. It is an implicit policy that both selects which evidence becomes training signal and decides how that evidence is answered, and it is fragile at both stages. When choosing what to ask, generators do not scan a document uniformly. Coverage saturates early and concentrates on salient spans, diverse prompts converge on the same regions, and what looks question-worthy is driven by local presentation. As a result, salient artifacts such as poorly cleaned markup can hijack question generation across model families and scales. When answering, the model that produces the supervision tends to obey instruction-like passages embedded in the text. This compliance depends on the intent and surface form of the passage rather than its strictness, and is worst under task conflict, where larger models comply more often. These failure modes arise from choices made during QA generation, so they can be reduced without changing the training loop. Tying each question to a fixed target reduces biased selection, and filtering instruction-like spans before answering lowers mean injection compliance from $88\%$ to $13\%$ in our evaluation while retaining nearly all clean text.
2606.32002.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型越來越多地從合成的問題--回答 (QA) 監督中學習：模型生成有關文檔的問題，從相同的文本中回答這些問題，結果對的配對用於微調、提煉或將知識壓縮到另一個模型中。我們顯示這一生成步驟並不是中立的預處理。這是一種隱含的政策，既選擇哪些證據成為訓練信號，又決定如何回答這些證據，並且在這兩個階段都很脆弱。在選擇要問什麼時，生成器不會均勻地掃描文檔。覆蓋率很早就飽和並集中於顯著的區域，多樣的提示則集中於相同的區域，而看起來值得提問的內容則受到局部呈現的驅動。因此，顯著的工件，如清理不當的標記，可以在模型家族和規模之間劫持問題生成。在回答時，生成監督的模型往往遵循嵌入文本中的指令類段落。這種遵從性取決於段落的意圖和表面形式，而不是其嚴謹性，並且在任務衝突下最糟糕，較大的模型更常遵從。這些失敗模式源於在 QA 生成過程中做出的選擇，因此可以在不改變訓練循環的情況下減少。將每個問題與固定目標綁定可以減少偏見選擇，並在回答之前過濾指令類段落，能將我們評估中的平均注入遵從性從 $88\%$ 降低到 $13\%$，同時保留幾乎所有的乾淨文本。
2606.32002.author: Ekaterina Alimaskina et.al.
2606.32002.authors: Ekaterina Alimaskina, Denis Shveykin, Gleb Molodtsov, Igor Shalygin, Alexey Kadeishvili, Aleksandr Beznosikov
